text:
1. Note the time zone offsets: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, and Europe/Athens is UTC + 2. The time difference is (2 - (- 10)) = 12 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 08:00 + 12:00 = 20:00.
3. Since we add hours and cross the date - line, the date becomes March 21 + 1 = March 22.
FINAL_ANSWER: 22 March 1784 20:00
